consentedProfileCount.description: The number of profiles that consented this objective.

creationDate.description: The creation date of the object. Datetime in UTC in the https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3339.txt format, example = "2025-01-22T11:21:33.872Z".

lastModifiedDate.description: The last modified date of the object. Datetime in UTC in the https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3339.txt format, example = "2025-01-22T11:21:33.872Z".

lastProfileMutationDate.description: The last time a profile consented the objective. Updated once per hour.

legislations.description: The legislations this objectives applies to.

items.description: The legislations this objectives applies to.

needsConsent.description: Indicates whether this objective requires consent.

objectiveDescription.example: For marketing purposes, to personalize content.

references.description: The items that this objective applies to.

refusedProfileCount.description: The number of profiles that refused this objective.

totalProfileCount.description: The number of profiles that have refused or consented this objective.
